name: Retro Portable AM/FM Bluetooth Radio Cream - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Tune in to your favorite music at home or on the go with the Retro Portable AM/FM Bluetooth Radio from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This radio features AM/FM radio and Bluetooth to help you listen to your favorite music anytime. It comes with a button to adjust frequency plus a button to help you adjust the volume according to your need. Complete with an owner's manual and USB cable, this portable radio requires 18650 lithium batteries for operation.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather ∙ Create ∙ Enjoy
